message:
feat(robot,checkpoint,cli,bv): add inspect-work/coordination/quota/incident surfaces, harden checkpoint and upgrade reliability

- Add four new projection-backed robot inspect surfaces: inspect-work (by bead id),
  inspect-coordination (by agent mail identity), inspect-quota (by provider/account),
  and inspect-incident (by incident id); register flags, capabilities, schema entries,
  and registry metadata for all four
- Extend InspectSessionOutput and InspectAgentOutput with a Diagnostics field
  ([]InspectDiagnosticSection) carrying machine-readable explainability entries;
  add InspectProjectionInfo.StaleReasons and helpers for building diagnostic sections
- Fix OutputCapture.Stats() OldestCapture to track the global minimum across panes
  instead of last-pane wins; log (not silently drop) conflict detection errors
- Harden checkpoint BackgroundWorker: drain stale events on Start, guard SendEvent
  against not-running workers, and reset started/cancel state in run() defer
- Ensure checkpoint directory exists before SaveGitPatch/SaveGitStatus writes
- Fix upgrade binary replacement to nil dstFile after close to prevent double-close
  in defer and properly propagate close errors
- Add WaitDelay=1s to all bv/br exec.CommandContext calls to prevent pipe hangs

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -80,6 +80,7 @@ func run(dir string, args ...string) (string, error) {
 
 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "bv", args...)
 	cmd.Dir = normalizedDir
+	cmd.WaitDelay = time.Second // Prevent hanging on open pipes if child processes outlive context
 	var stdout, stderr bytes.Buffer
 	cmd.Stdout = &stdout
 	cmd.Stderr = &stderr
@@ -201,6 +202,7 @@ func CheckDrift(dir string) DriftResult {
 	defer cancel()
 
 	cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "bv", "--check-drift")
+	cmd.WaitDelay = time.Second // Prevent hanging on open pipes
 	cmd.Dir = dir
 	var stdout, stderr bytes.Buffer
 	cmd.Stdout = &stdout
@@ -667,6 +669,7 @@ func RunBd(dir string, args ...string) (string, error) {
 		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), DefaultTimeout)
 
 		cmd := exec.CommandContext(ctx, "br", args...)
+		cmd.WaitDelay = time.Second // Prevent hanging on open pipes
 		cmd.Dir = dir
 		var stdout, stderr bytes.Buffer
 		cmd.Stdout = &stdout

@@ -248,6 +248,46 @@ func buildCommandRegistry() []RobotCommandInfo {
 			},
 			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-inspect-agent=myproject:%1"},
 		},
+		{
+			Name:        "inspect-work",
+			Flag:        "--robot-inspect-work",
+			Category:    "state",
+			Description: "Projection-backed work-item drill-down with stable bead identity.",
+			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
+				{Name: "bead_id", Flag: "--robot-inspect-work", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Bead id from snapshot/work surfaces"},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-inspect-work=bd-j9jo3.6.6"},
+		},
+		{
+			Name:        "inspect-coordination",
+			Flag:        "--robot-inspect-coordination",
+			Category:    "state",
+			Description: "Projection-backed coordination drill-down keyed by Agent Mail identity.",
+			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
+				{Name: "agent_name", Flag: "--robot-inspect-coordination", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Agent Mail identity / coordination key"},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-inspect-coordination=BlueLake"},
+		},
+		{
+			Name:        "inspect-quota",
+			Flag:        "--robot-inspect-quota",
+			Category:    "state",
+			Description: "Projection-backed quota drill-down keyed by provider/account.",
+			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
+				{Name: "quota_id", Flag: "--robot-inspect-quota", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Provider/account identity, e.g. anthropic/default"},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-inspect-quota=anthropic/default"},
+		},
+		{
+			Name:        "inspect-incident",
+			Flag:        "--robot-inspect-incident",
+			Category:    "state",
+			Description: "Store-backed incident drill-down keyed by stable incident id.",
+			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
+				{Name: "incident_id", Flag: "--robot-inspect-incident", Type: "string", Required: true, Description: "Incident id from snapshot/attention surfaces"},
+			},
+			Examples: []string{"ntm --robot-inspect-incident=inc_20260323_abc123"},
+		},
 		{
 			Name:        "files",
 			Flag:        "--robot-files",

@@ -170,8 +170,12 @@ func TestOutputTypesEmbedRobotResponse(t *testing.T) {
 		{"HealthOutput", reflect.TypeOf(HealthOutput{})},
 		{"HistoryOutput", reflect.TypeOf(HistoryOutput{})},
 		{"InspectAgentOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectAgentOutput{})},
+		{"InspectCoordinationOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectCoordinationOutput{})},
+		{"InspectIncidentOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectIncidentOutput{})},
 		{"InspectPaneOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectPaneOutput{})},
+		{"InspectQuotaOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectQuotaOutput{})},
 		{"InspectSessionOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectSessionOutput{})},
+		{"InspectWorkOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InspectWorkOutput{})},
 		{"InterruptOutput", reflect.TypeOf(InterruptOutput{})},
 		{"IsWorkingOutput", reflect.TypeOf(IsWorkingOutput{})},
 		{"JFPBundlesOutput", reflect.TypeOf(JFPBundlesOutput{})},

@@ -26,9 +26,13 @@ var SchemaCommand = map[string]interface{}{
 	"proxy_status": ProxyStatusOutput{},
 
 	// Pane inspection
-	"inspect":         InspectPaneOutput{},
-	"inspect_session": InspectSessionOutput{},
-	"inspect_agent":   InspectAgentOutput{},
+	"inspect":              InspectPaneOutput{},
+	"inspect_session":      InspectSessionOutput{},
+	"inspect_agent":        InspectAgentOutput{},
+	"inspect_work":         InspectWorkOutput{},
+	"inspect_coordination": InspectCoordinationOutput{},
+	"inspect_quota":        InspectQuotaOutput{},
+	"inspect_incident":     InspectIncidentOutput{},
 
 	// Ensemble
 	"ensemble":       EnsembleOutput{},
